welcomeBanner.title: Welcome to SITES.BD
welcomeBanner.subtitle: Claim a free subdomain on sites.bd, esite.top, or esite.in and point it anywhere you like — all from one dashboard.

connectionGuide.title: Connect your domain
connectionGuide.intro: Already own a domain elsewhere? Point it at SITES.BD in a couple of steps.

steps.title: Search & claim
steps.body: Use the domain search to register a free SITES.BD subdomain, or skip to step 2 with one you already own.

steps.title: Choose how to connect
steps.body: Switch your domain to our system nameservers, or keep your current DNS provider and add a CNAME / A record.

steps.title: Verify
steps.body: We watch for the DNS change and mark the domain Verified automatically — usually within minutes.

connectionGuide.tip: Most setups finish in under 10 minutes. SSL is provisioned automatically once verification completes.

faq.a: Yes — SITES.BD subdomains under sites.bd, esite.top, and esite.in are free for personal and small-business use. There are no hidden renewal fees.

faq.q: How long does DNS verification take?
faq.a: Once you update your DNS, we re-check every few minutes. Most domains verify within 5–10 minutes, but propagation can occasionally take up to an hour.

faq.q: Can I use my own nameservers?
faq.a: Yes. Pick "Manual DNS" when you claim the domain and add the CNAME or A records we generate. You stay in control of your DNS provider.
Free SSL is provisioned automatically through Cloudflare as soon as your domain is verified. There is nothing to install or renew.

faq.q: How do hosting orders get fulfilled?
faq.a: After checkout you'll see your invoice and order under Invoices and Services. We provision hosting manually within a few hours and post credentials to the ticket attached to the order.

faq.q: Who do I contact if something breaks?
faq.a: Open a support ticket from the Tickets page or message us on WhatsApp from any service detail screen. We answer the same day, every day.

terms.termsAndConditions:
Terms of Service

These Terms govern your use of SITES.BD's free subdomain service operating under sites.bd, esite.top, esite.in, and any additional parent domains added to our registry from time to time. By claiming a subdomain you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms.

1. Eligibility & account integrity
You must be at least 13 years old, provide accurate contact details, and keep your account credentials confidential. You are responsible for every action taken under your account. SITES.BD may suspend or terminate any account that supplies false information, attempts to bypass platform controls, or shares credentials with other parties.

2. Free service & fair use
The subdomain itself is provided free of charge for personal and small-business use. We rely on fair-use limits to keep the service free for everyone:

  • A single account may hold a reasonable number of active subdomains (currently capped via the dashboard).
  • You may not register subdomains in bulk for resale, link-farming, or brand-squatting.
  • Automated registrations through scripts, scrapers, or third-party bots are prohibited.

We may, at our discretion, reclaim subdomains that breach fair-use limits after notifying the registrant via email.

3. Prohibited content & activities
You agree not to publish, host, link to, or facilitate any content or activity that:

  • Violates the laws of Bangladesh or any jurisdiction in which the content is accessed;
  • Infringes intellectual-property rights, trademarks, or publicity rights;
  • Promotes phishing, malware, credential harvesting, or financial fraud;
  • Hosts child sexual-abuse material, non-consensual intimate imagery, or content that sexualises minors;
  • Incites terrorism, organised violence, or genocide;
  • Targets a person or group with harassment, threats, or doxxing;
  • Operates an unlicensed gambling, lottery, or escrow service;
  • Distributes pirated software, leaked databases, or other unauthorised copies of protected works;
  • Conducts unsolicited bulk email, SMS, or messaging campaigns of any kind.

We cooperate with Bangladesh Telecommunication Regulatory Commission (BTRC) requests, law-enforcement subpoenas, and Cloudflare's abuse process. We may suspend a subdomain immediately upon credible report of any of the above; due-process review then happens via support ticket.

4. DNS, hosting, and uptime
SITES.BD provides DNS management via Cloudflare and may offer optional NVMe SSD hosting. While we operate the service on a best-effort basis with monitoring and redundancy, the service is provided "as is" without uptime guarantees, warranties of merchantability, or warranties of fitness for a particular purpose. We do not guarantee that the subdomain will be available indefinitely; legitimate ownership disputes, brand-protection requests, or service-wide policy changes may require us to reclaim a subdomain.

5. Data, privacy, and email
We collect the minimum information necessary to run the service: email, name, contact mobile, and addresses entered during sign-up; DNS records you create; and operational telemetry. We do not sell your data. We may email you for account-critical notifications (security alerts, verification, abuse notices, scheduled maintenance). Promotional emails require your explicit opt-in. Our processors include Supabase (auth + database) and Cloudflare (DNS + WAF).

6. Termination & reclamation
You may release a subdomain at any time from the dashboard. We may suspend, reclaim, or transfer a subdomain when (a) the registrant breaches these Terms; (b) the subdomain is dormant for an extended period and a holder reservation has expired; (c) a court order, valid take-down notice, or regulatory directive requires it; or (d) the subdomain is impersonating a brand, public figure, or government entity. Reclaimed subdomains may be re-issued to the legitimate rights-holder or held in reserve.

7. Disputes & limitation of liability
To the maximum extent permitted by law, SITES.BD, its operators, contractors, and affiliates are not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising out of or related to the service, including loss of data, loss of business, or reputational harm. Our aggregate liability for any direct damages is limited to the fees you have paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim — which, for free subdomains, is zero.

8. Changes to these Terms
We may amend these Terms to reflect new features, regulatory requirements, or abuse-handling improvements. Material changes will be announced at least 14 days in advance via dashboard banner and email. Continued use of the subdomain after the effective date constitutes acceptance.

9. Governing law & contact
These Terms are governed by the laws of the People's Republic of Bangladesh. Disputes that cannot be resolved through good-faith negotiation will be submitted to the courts of Dhaka. For abuse reports, takedown requests, and account questions, open a ticket from the Tickets page or email support@sites.bd.

By clicking "I Accept" below, you confirm that you have read these Terms in their entirety, that you accept the Domain Usage Policy that follows, and that you are authorised to bind the registrant identified in your account.
terms.domainUsagePolicy:
Domain Usage Policy

The Domain Usage Policy expands on Section 3 of the Terms of Service. It describes how a SITES.BD subdomain may and may not be used.

1. Permitted use
A SITES.BD subdomain may be used to:

  • Host a personal portfolio, résumé, blog, or hobby project.
  • Run a small-business storefront, brochure site, or landing page.
  • Stand up educational projects, non-profit campaigns, or community announcements.
  • Point at hosting you operate elsewhere via CNAME, A record, or our system nameservers.
  • Serve internal tools — staging environments, link shorteners, status pages — provided they comply with the prohibitions below.

2. Naming conventions
You may pick any name that:

  • Is 2–30 characters long and uses only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens (not at the start or end);
  • Is not in the reserved-name list (see src/config/reservedSubdomains.json — names like www, mail, ns1, admin, api, root, postmaster, etc., are reserved for platform routing);
  • Does not impersonate a recognised Bangladesh government body, a financial institution, a public figure, a registered trademark, or another SITES.BD user;
  • Does not contain slurs, sexual content, or references to prohibited activities.

SITES.BD reserves the right to reclaim any subdomain that, in our reasonable judgement, breaches the naming rules above — including names registered before the rule was formalised. We will notify the registrant via email before reclamation when practical.

3. Content prohibitions
You may not publish, host, link to, or facilitate:

  • Phishing pages, credential-stealing forms, fake login pages, or fraud kits.
  • Malware distribution, command-and-control infrastructure, exploit kits, or stealer panels.
  • Child sexual-abuse material (CSAM), non-consensual intimate imagery, or content that sexualises minors. This is reported immediately to the appropriate authorities and Cloudflare.
  • Material that incites terrorism, ethnic or religious violence, genocide, or armed insurrection.
  • Pirated software, cracked games, leaked databases, key generators, or unauthorised redistributions of copyrighted media.
  • Unregulated gambling, lotteries, ponzi schemes, pyramid schemes, or unlicensed financial-investment offerings.
  • Targeted harassment, doxxing, or threats against an identifiable individual or group.
  • Misleading impersonation of a brand, government agency, or public figure where a reasonable visitor would be deceived.

4. Technical prohibitions
You may not use a SITES.BD subdomain (or the DNS infrastructure that backs it) to:

  • Run open SMTP relays, sending unsolicited bulk email, or any SMS / chat campaigns without recipient opt-in.
  • Operate command-and-control nodes, proxy networks, anonymisation gateways, or VPN exits not declared in your account.
  • Run port scans, brute-force attacks, denial-of-service campaigns, or any traffic that materially impacts a third party.
  • Mine cryptocurrency or host JavaScript that mines using a visitor's CPU / GPU without explicit consent.
  • Bypass platform controls, including registering through automated scripts, sharing accounts, or chaining short-lived emails to claim more than the per-account quota.

5. Abuse-handling & due process
Reports may be filed by opening a support ticket from the Tickets page or emailing support@sites.bd. Urgent reports (phishing, malware, CSAM, threats to life) are triaged within hours. For clear-cut violations we suspend the subdomain immediately and notify the registrant via email; the registrant has 14 days to appeal via support ticket. For ambiguous reports we contact the registrant first and give 72 hours for a written response. SITES.BD cooperates with Bangladesh Telecommunication Regulatory Commission (BTRC) directives, court orders, and Cloudflare's abuse process.

6. Service-wide reservations
SITES.BD operators may, at their discretion:

  • Refuse or reclaim names that would obviously conflict with a future SITES.BD product (e.g., status, console, billing).
  • Reclaim subdomains that have shown zero DNS query traffic for an extended period after registration.
  • Block specific TLD / name combinations that have repeatedly been used for abuse, regardless of which account currently holds them.

7. Acceptance
By clicking "I Accept" you confirm that the subdomain you are about to claim will be operated in accordance with this Domain Usage Policy and the broader Terms of Service. Repeated or wilful breach of this policy may result in permanent account suspension and forfeiture of any subdomains held under that account.
